occurrence_sentence: Bessemer Venture Partners leads a $79 million Series C round in quantum computing pioneer, Rigetti Computing.

Rigetti Computing, a leading quantum computing startup and pioneer in hybrid quantum-classical computing systems, has announced [in a statement](http://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2020/08/04/2072699/0/en/Bessemer-Leads-79M-Series-C-Round-of-Rigetti-Computing-to-Advance-Practical-Quantum-Computing.html) that it closed a $79 million Series C financing led by [Bessemer Venture Partners.
